task_completion.description: Document metadata (Source, Rights, Language) has been updated according to publication standards.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the document properties or metadata view in the web interface showing populated fields for 'Source' (dc:source), 'Rights' (dc:rights), and 'Language' (dc:language).

task_completion.description: Workflow stage tags ('ready-for-review' or 'needs-revision') are applied to the documents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the tags 'ready-for-review' or 'needs-revision' attached to the documents, typically visible in the document summary view or tags section.

task_completion.description: Editorial assessment Notes summarizing publication readiness have been created for each reviewed document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Projects workspace showing newly created Note documents (distinct from the original documents) that contain editorial assessments or summaries of readiness.

task_completion.description: A collection named 'Q4 2025 Publications' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Collections' workspace or a list of collections that includes one explicitly named 'Q4 2025 Publications'.

task_completion.description: The 'Q4 2025 Publications' collection contains the documents tagged 'ready-for-review'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the contents of the 'Q4 2025 Publications' collection, verifying that it contains the specific documents that were tagged as 'ready-for-review'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the application via the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the document management system (Nuxeo) rather than terminal windows executing curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the notes and collections within the platform.
integrity.visual_evidence: The newly created Notes and Collections should appear natively within the platform's UI (e.g., in the Projects workspace and Collections tab), not just as text files on the desktop.

integrity.description: The agent did not use backend database or direct server manipulation to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing SQL commands, python scripts, or direct Nuxeo server console commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task takes place in a document management system (Nuxeo). There are 4 synthetic documents to process. The agent must consult the 'Editorial Standards and Publication Guidelines' Note in the Projects workspace to determine how to update the metadata and which tags to apply. The agent must update the 'Source' (dc:source), 'Rights' (dc:rights), and 'Language' (dc:language) fields. Tags must be exactly 'ready-for-review' or 'needs-revision'. A collection named 'Q4 2025 Publications' must be created and populated with the 'ready-for-review' documents. Editorial assessment Notes must be created in the Projects workspace evaluating each article.
